/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN & ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 07-01-22(10TH)/X: THE 60TH DAY IS 08-16-22,/NB/X:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/SA1: DAJHUNIQUE THOMPSON, TIERNEY KEANE-ZIRPOLO/SA2: 211 PUTNAM ST,SF & 1913 OAKDALE AVE, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 06-20-22/DOP/
